reviews.comment:
Pregunté para hospedarme en el hotel de acá  no sabían explicarme estacione en la calle y fui al shopp  era  la hora 21.20  le pido un tostado y un cortado. Me dijeron que tostado no porque. Cerraban a las 22.hs .me fui al carrito que está enfrente  y comí ahí, y dormí en el hotel Chiclana .

(Translated by Google)
I asked about staying at the hotel here, but they couldn't explain it to me. I parked on the street and went to the shopping center. It was 9:20 PM. I asked for a toasted sandwich and a cortado. They told me no toasted sandwiches because they closed at 10 PM. I went to the food cart across the street and ate there, and I slept at the Hotel Chiclana.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLenZ1V1VBEAE
